plugins.name: yorph-semantic-layer-builder
plugins.description: A guided, AI-powered semantic layer builder that connects to your data warehouse and generates optimized semantic layer definitions using parallel Claude agents.

plugins.name: yorph-data-analyst
plugins.description: End-to-end data transformation and analysis pipeline for non-technical users. Two-agent architecture: an Orchestrator that handles all user communication, planning, and delivery; and a Pipeline Builder that handles technical data work in the background.

plugins.name: yorph-research-writer
plugins.description: A LaTeX research paper authoring environment. Create, edit, compile, and critique academic papers directly through Claude — with a live browser-based PDF viewer that auto-refreshes on recompile.

plugins.name: yorph-cc-convo-to-demo
plugins.description: Extract demo-worthy conversation segments and render them as embeddable HTML widgets styled like Claude Desktop.

plugins.name: yorph-cc-convo-to-eval
plugins.description: Conversation eval system for Claude Code plugins. Captures real conversations as regression test cases and replays them to catch regressions when plugin code changes.

plugins.name: yorph-eval-dueling
plugins.description: Evaluate and judge analyst skills against each other using structured rubrics and an interactive eval harness.

plugins.name: yorph-conversation-memory
plugins.description: Conversation memory that survives context compaction.
